name: INGLES MARKETS INC
business: Ingles Markets operates a supermarket chain in the Southeast United States, selling grocery, non-food, perishable, and fuel products. The company also operates a fluid dairy processing plant and earns shopping center rentals. As of September 27, 2025, it had 194 supermarkets and 112 in-store pharmacies and 106 fuel stations.

exposures.sentence: Ingles supermarkets offer customers a wide variety of nationally advertised food products, including grocery, meat and dairy products, produce, frozen foods and other perishables and non-food products.
The Ingles Curbside service allows customers to order any product in the Company's stores online.
Non-food products include fuel centers, pharmacies, health/beauty/cosmetic products and general merchandise.
The Company is self-insured for workers compensation, general liability, and group medical and dental benefits.

catalysts.event: Reopening of three stores temporarily closed due to Hurricane Helene
catalysts.sentence: Four stores sustained damage that required that they be temporarily closed, of which, as of the date of this Annual Report on Form 10-K, three remain closed and are currently expected to reopen at various times during 2026 or in 2027.
Ingles capital expenditure plans for fiscal year 2026 include investments of approximately $120 to $140 million.

catalysts.event: Maturity of interest rate swap with notional amount $12.5 million
catalysts.sentence: Both the floating rate debt and the interest rate swap have monthly principal amortization of $0.5 million and mature October 1, 2027.

catalysts.event: Maturity of $155 million loan secured by real estate
catalysts.sentence: Both the floating rate debt and the interest rate swap have monthly principal amortization of $0.65 million and mature in fiscal year 2030.
